## Investment View
CRAP scores 62/100 as a constructive_watch setup. The score is driven mainly by the technical breakout picture and ENTRY_READY status, with 1 constructive versus 0 adverse stock-specific signals and a market overlay impact of 0 supportive versus 0 adverse effects.

- Thesis: The setup is actionable only while the breakout level continues to hold and recent constructive signals, including the broader market overlay when relevant, keep getting follow-through.

## What Matters
- Volume anomaly is strong at 3.09, which supports the move. (high)
- The feed already classifies the name as ENTRY_READY rather than a lower-conviction candidate. (high)

## Risks / Invalidation
- Price is still below the prior 20-day high (142.50), so the breakout remains unconfirmed. (high)
- A close back below 142.50 would weaken or invalidate the current breakout picture. (high)
